race.comment: CHLOE FIRST (14) resumed from a spell last start with a sound third over 1000m at Pakenham when she made late ground to grab third when well supported. That was an encouraging run, especially going to 1200m here in an easier race. GALACTIC FORCE (5) resumed with a solid run at Sale on heavy ground. He'll be fitter for that and can push on despite a tricky gate. BRUTAL TEMPO (4) is a gelding by Brutal on debut for the Kavanagh yard who has jumped out fairly well and looks to have good ability, respecting. TWO TO TANGO (15) didn't fire in her debut run last time in but was in the market and can be a sharp improver this time around. DIVINE EMPRESS (8) should be peaking third up and will be hard to catch.
